<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #warp-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="warp-logo">
    <title>Warp</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M12.035 2.723h9.253A2.712 2.712 0 0 1 24 5.435v10.529a2.712 2.712 0 0 1-2.712 2.713H8.047Zm-1.681 2.6L6.766 19.677h5.598l-.399 1.6H2.712A2.712 2.712 0 0 1 0 18.565V8.036a2.712 2.712 0 0 1 2.712-2.712Z" />
    </g>
</svg>
